description.en: The default value for the parameter. If the parameter has no default value, this attribute is set to Parameter.empty.

info.excerpt: The default value for the parameter. If the parameter has no default value, this attribute is set to Parameter.empty.

description.en: Describes an enum value of Parameter.kind. Added in version 3.8. Example: print all descriptions of arguments: >>> def foo(a, b, *, c, d=10): ... pass >>> sig = signature(foo) >>> for param in sig.parameters.values(): ... print(param.kind.description) positional or keyword positional or keyword keyword-only keyword-only

info.excerpt: Describes an enum value of Parameter.kind. Added in version 3.8. Example: print all descriptions of arguments: >>> def foo(a, b, *, c, d=10): ... pass >>> sig = signature(foo) >>> for param in sig.par...
